channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer Weekend Hours of Operations Change in Commons Dining Hall
item.description: Please be advised that beginning Saturday, June 20, 2026, the Commons Dining Hall weekend hours of operation will change. New Weekend Hours are: 11:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Saturdays and Sundays) Thank you.
item.author: Students

item.title: Carousel Maintenance Scheduled for June 17th
item.description:
Carousel has planned maintenance for the Rensselaer cloud instance on Wednesday, Jun 17, 2026 between 9pm and 11pm Eastern time. During this window, there will be a period where the user interface will be inaccessible (slides cannot be uploaded or modified), and players will display cached content. Players will all automatically reconnect and display updated content once maintenance has been completed.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
